canonical_definition: A library of real-world benchmark instances for the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) used to evaluate the performance of optimization algorithms.
papers: Large Language Model-driven Large Neighborhood Search for Large-Scale MILP Problems
Neural Genetic Search in Discrete Spaces
